class.name: PlayFabPlayerData
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.player_data[/code]. This service wraps client-safe PlayFab client player data, publisher data, and custom-property APIs from the GDK PlayFab Services SDK. Methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser], accept an optional request [Dictionary] using snake_case PlayFab field names, and return a completion [Signal] that emits [PlayFabResult]. Result payloads are converted to Godot Dictionaries and Arrays.

method.name: delete_player_custom_properties_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFPlayerDataManagementClientDeletePlayerCustomProperties[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_player_custom_property_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFPlayerDataManagementClientGetPlayerCustomProperty[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_user_data_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFPlayerDataManagementClientGetUserData[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_user_publisher_data_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFPlayerDataManagementClientGetUserPublisherData[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_user_publisher_read_only_data_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFPlayerDataManagementClientGetUserPublisherReadOnlyData[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_user_read_only_data_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFPlayerDataManagementClientGetUserReadOnlyData[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: list_player_custom_properties_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFPlayerDataManagementClientListPlayerCustomProperties[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: update_player_custom_properties_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFPlayerDataManagementClientUpdatePlayerCustomProperties[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: update_user_data_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFPlayerDataManagementClientUpdateUserData[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: update_user_publisher_data_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFPlayerDataManagementClientUpdateUserPublisherData[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.
